  • Classes in net.boricj.bft.omf used by net.boricj.bft.omf
    Class
    Description
    OmfChunkingPolicy
    Chunking policy for OMF record emission.
    OmfComent
    Abstract base class for OMF comment record data.
    OmfFile
    Represents an OMF (Object Module Format) file.
    OmfFile.Builder
    Builder for constructing OMF files programmatically.
    OmfFile.Parser
    Parser for reading OMF files from input streams.
    OmfRecord
    Abstract base class for all OMF record types.
